summary: Crystal‑clear audience recording with superb instrument separation and balance.
review: The taper’s AUD source is praised as crystal clear in both highs and lows, with a subdued crowd that lets the music breathe. Reviewers note excellent instrument separation and overall balance, making this one of the best available recordings of the show despite no specific musical commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 5‑star review is present; it focuses on audio excellence but provides no detail on the performance itself, so rating leans heavily on recording quality with limited confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal clear highs and lows, great instrument separation, balanced mix, subdued audience ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; overall impression is very positive.
